items.title: Cellular Intelligence licenses Novo’s shelved Parkinson’s cell therapy programme
items.summary: Novo Nordisk shuttered its cell therapy unit in October 2025, with assets now moving to new hands.

items.title: FDA locks down post-approval pregnancy safety data framework
items.summary: This FDA framework comes as significant knowledge gaps remain around the efficacy and safety of drugs in pregnancy and lactation.

items.title: ACROBiosystems upgrades HEK293 licence solution for R&D compliance
items.summary: ACROBiosystems has upgraded its global license solution for HEK293 functional cell lines to expedite biopharmaceutical R&D.

items.title: BMS’ Sotyktu secures EC approval for psoriatic arthritis
items.summary: BMS has secured approval from the European Commission for Sotyktu (deucravacitinib) to treat active psoriatic arthritis (PsA).

items.title: Japan’s FY26 price revision expands G1 repricing and drives price reduction
items.summary: Japan’s latest NHI drug price revision for FY26 has now come into effect, with an average 4.02% drop in prices on a spending basis across 15,800 products.
